overall.description: A cinematic drive through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077 during a rainy night. The vehicle navigates neon-lit downtown streets, stopping at traffic lights and passing towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements before approaching Watson Bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass emerging into downtown street

events.description: exits covered underpass into open neon-lit city street
slight right turn onto main commercial avenue

agents.ego_description: driving through the underpass and emerging into downtown Night City, navigating wet reflective streets

entered.detail: concrete ceiling of the underpass with fluorescent lighting
tall modern glass building with illuminated windows rising in the distance
massive vertical red neon sign on a corporate tower

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a covered underpass with artificial lighting, then emerges into the rain-slicked streets of Night City. A massive red neon corporate sign dominates the skyline ahead as the vehicle navigates onto the main avenue.

events.description: stopping at red traffic light at Ferguson intersection
traffic light turns green, proceeding through intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the Ferguson intersection, stopping at the red light, then proceeding as the light changes

notable_agents.action: black sedan stopped ahead at the red light

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying 'Ferguson' and advertisements
elevated walkway crossing above the street with glass sides
overhead gantry with traffic signals spanning the intersection

segments.scene_description: The vehicle stops at the Ferguson intersection beneath a pedestrian overpass, waiting at a red light surrounded by digital billboards. As the light turns green, the vehicle proceeds through the crosswalk, leaving the underpass behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane commercial corridor with dense holographic advertising

events.description: accelerating through the commercial district with heavy billboard presence
yellow SUV passes on the left side

tall building with 'MARMUS' corporate signage at the top
holographic advertisement for Orbital Air displayed on building facade
series of ground-level digital advertising screens lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Driving through a dense commercial corridor illuminated by massive holographic billboards including 'WET DREAM' and 'MARMUS' advertisements. The wet streets reflect the neon lights as the vehicle accelerates past a yellow SUV, with the red neon tower now visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: major downtown intersection with towering skyscrapers and traffic barriers

events.description: stopping at red light at major intersection with traffic barriers
light turns green, crossing the intersection with other traffic

agents.ego_description: approaching a major intersection, stopping at the red light beneath traffic barriers, then proceeding across the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: white sedan crossing the intersection from the left

entered.detail: red and white striped barrier gantry with traffic lights suspended over the road
distinctive tall building with spiral architectural design and red lighting accents
cluster of modern corporate towers with illuminated facades

segments.scene_description: The vehicle stops at a major intersection marked by red and white traffic barriers, with a distinctive spiral skyscraper dominating the skyline ahead. After the light turns green, the vehicle crosses the intersection, passing a white sedan and leaving the commercial billboards behind for the corporate plaza district.

scene_state.functional_zone: Watson Bridge approach with curved elevated roadway

events.description: taking a right curve onto the Watson Bridge approach
passing under the Watson Bridge signage entering the bridge area

agents.ego_description: navigating the curved approach to Watson Bridge, passing under the bridge signage while following a red sports car

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving ahead on the curved roadway

entered.detail: street sign reading 'Watson Bridge' mounted on a pole
building with large illuminated 'RCG' logo on the facade
asphalt road curving to the right with elevated bridge structure

segments.scene_description: The vehicle takes a right curve approaching Watson Bridge, passing under the bridge signage. The RCG building with its prominent logo stands on the right, while the vehicle follows a red sports car along the curving elevated roadway, leaving the downtown skyscrapers behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through the rain-slicked streets of Night City, transitioning from a claustrophobic underpass into a sprawling corporate district. It begins within a covered underpass under artificial light before emerging onto a main avenue dominated by a massive red neon corporate sign. As the vehicle pauses at the Ferguson intersection beneath a pedestrian overpass, the scene shifts into a dense commercial corridor where the wet pavement reflects holographic advertisements for Wet Dream and Marmus. The camera then proceeds through a major intersection marked by red and white barriers, passing a spiral skyscraper before leaving the billboards behind for the corporate plaza. Finally, the vehicle takes a right curve toward Watson Bridge, following a red sports car past the RCG building as the downtown skyscrapers recede into the distance.
